data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Core fix correctly removes early-return in useRehydrateTerminals so listSessions() always fetches backend state on mount, enabling cross-browser terminal discovery. Session registry extraction is clean. Store correctly opens panel for orphan running sessions. Test coverage comprehensive: unit test for always-fetch, 4 store tests for panel open/minimize on rehydration, Playwright multi-context smoke script validating cross-browser rehydration, live status updates, and terminate controls. All gates pass (tsc clean, 211 test files / 2397 tests). Fixture route gated behind env var. No security concerns.
